advancements.rf.main.root.title: Basics & Progression
advancements.rf.main.root.description: Welcome to Raspberry Flavoured! More advancement categories will become available as you get started and gather items. For advancements with multiple criteria, you can hover over them and hold Shift to see what you're missing.
advancements.rf.main.pickaxe.title: It's in the Name
advancements.rf.main.pickaxe.description: Craft your first Pickaxe out of Planks and Sticks
advancements.rf.main.shield.title: En Garde!
advancements.rf.main.furnace.title: Hot Topic
advancements.rf.main.furnace.description: Craft and place down a Furnace to process materials
advancements.rf.main.copper_pickaxe.desc: Process Raw Copper into Copper Ingots in a Furnace and use them to craft a Copper Pickaxe
advancements.rf.main.iron.title: Irony
advancements.rf.main.armor.title: Armor Up
advancements.rf.main.lead_poisoning.desc: Get afflicted with the Stunning effect... were you carrying Lead in your hotbar, perchance?
advancements.rf.main.forge.title: Reforged
advancements.rf.main.forge.description: Place down a Forge to smelt ores faster, create better tools, armor, Enchanted Tablets and more
advancements.rf.main.bronze.title: Metal of Honor
advancements.rf.main.bronze.description: Alloy Copper, Zinc and Lead to obtain Bronze
advancements.rf.main.rose_gold.title: Have No Fear!
advancements.rf.main.rose_gold.descripti: Alloy Copper and Gold to obtain Rose Gold
advancements.rf.main.pickaxe_upgrade.des: Forge an Iron or higher tier Pickaxe
advancements.rf.main.silver.title: It's No Use!
advancements.rf.main.electrum.title: Gotta Go Fast!
advancements.rf.main.smithing_table.desc: Place down a Smithing Table to upgrade and enchant various equipment
advancements.rf.main.rose_gold_upgrade.d: Use Rose Gold in a Smithing Table on your Iron equipment
advancements.rf.main.steel_upgrade.title: Man of Steel
advancements.rf.main.steel_upgrade.descr: Use Steel in a Smithing Table on your Iron tools and Chainmail armor
advancements.rf.main.special_weapons.des: Create all five special modified weapons
advancements.rf.main.enchanted_tablet.de: Find or create any Enchanted Tablet
Crush a Nether Star into Stardust and use it to forge an Everlasting Tablet
advancements.rf.main.polishing.title: We Are the Crystal Gems
advancements.rf.main.polishing.descripti: Use Sandpaper or a Grindstone to polish Rough Cinnabar, Diamond or Quartz
advancements.rf.main.diamond_armor.title: Cover Me in Diamonds
advancements.rf.main.diamond_armor.descr: Use Mechanical Crafters to create a full set of Diamond armor
advancements.rf.main.electrum_armor.desc: Create a full set of Electrum armor
advancements.rf.main.necromium_armor.des: Create a full set of Necromium armor
advancements.rf.main.netherite_armor.des: Create a full set of Netherite armor
advancements.rf.main.all_metals.title: Metallic Madness
advancements.rf.farming.root.title: Cultivation & Foraging
advancements.rf.farming.campfire.title: F-F-Fire!
advancements.rf.farming.campfire.descrip: Light some Campfire Kindling with a Fire Striker or by sneak-right-clicking with Twigs in both hands
advancements.rf.farming.sap.title: Happy Sappy
advancements.rf.farming.sap.description: Right-click on a Sappy Maple Log with a Bottle to obtain Sap
advancements.rf.farming.bait.title: Is This Bait?
advancements.rf.farming.bait.description: Obtain any kind of fishing bait, be it Worms, Spider Eyes, Fireflies or Caterpillars
advancements.rf.farming.fishing_gear.des: Upgrade to a Reinforced Fishing Rod and place down a Tackle Box
advancements.rf.farming.all_fish.title: Master Baiter
advancements.rf.farming.harvest_honey.de: Light a Campfire under a Bee Nest or Hive and harvest the Honey with a Bottle, or some Honeycombs with Shears
advancements.rf.farming.keg.title: Ninety-Nine Bottles
advancements.rf.farming.keg.description: Place down a Keg to make special beverages with unique effects and other fun preserved foods
advancements.rf.farming.pizza_time.title: Pizza Time Never Ends
advancements.rf.farming.pizza_time.descr: Have a stack of Pizza Slices in your inventory
advancements.rf.farming.happy_hour.title: It's Happy Hour!
advancements.rf.farming.happy_hour.descr: Consume everything that afflicts you with the Tipsy effect
advancements.rf.farming.hoe.title: Reap What You Sow
advancements.rf.farming.plant_seed.title: Farmacy
advancements.rf.farming.truffle.title: Truff Luck
advancements.rf.farming.truffle.descript: Feed a Golden Carrot to a Pig and have it lead you to some Buried Truffles
advancements.rf.farming.all_crops.title: Plentiful Harvest
advancements.rf.farming.all_crops.descri: Obtain at least one of every single fruit, vegetable or other crop product
Place down Organic Compost and let it sit for a while
advancements.rf.farming.rich_soil.title: Quality Assurance
advancements.rf.farming.rich_soil.descri: Obtain Rich Soil by letting Organic Compost decompose
advancements.rf.farming.all_hoes.title: Hoes Mad
advancements.rf.farming.all_hoes.descrip: Obtain one of every single type of Hoe
advancements.rf.farming.oven.title: Why Do They Call It Oven?
advancements.rf.farming.oven.description: Place down an Oven on a heated block to cook foods faster or make meals and baked goods
advancements.rf.farming.cooking_pot.desc: Place down a Cooking Pot on a heated block to cook meals and brew beverages
advancements.rf.farming.all_pancakes.des: Use Honey, Jam, Syrup, Chocolate and Lemon to top Pancakes
advancements.rf.farming.all_cakes.title: Not a Lie
advancements.rf.farming.all_pies.title: Pie Flavor!
advancements.rf.farming.feast.title: Good Eatin'
advancements.rf.farming.feast.descriptio: Make and place down any type of feast, placeable foods that you can take multiple portions out of
advancements.rf.farming.questionable_die: Eat Dog Food, Cat Food, Horse Feed, Slabdish, a Hot Cream Cone and a Blaze Tart
advancements.rf.farming.ice_cubes.title: I Want Revenge!
advancements.rf.farming.flavors.title: Flavor Town
advancements.rf.farming.flavors.descript: Have the Agility, Berserking, Caffeinated, Flourishing, Harmony, Maturity, Sugar Rush, Tenacity and Vanilla Scent effects on you all at once
advancements.rf.farming.potato_meals.des: Make every meal and drink that contains Potatoes
advancements.rf.farming.knife.title: Cutting Edge
advancements.rf.farming.straw.title: Grasping at Straws
advancements.rf.farming.straw.descriptio: Use a Knife to harvest some Straw from Grass or crops like Wheat and Corn
advancements.rf.farming.ham.title: Ham Gone Ham Ham
advancements.rf.farming.ham.description: Obtain Ham by killing a Pig or Hoglin with a Knife
advancements.rf.farming.mob_heads.title: I'ma Head Out
advancements.rf.farming.mob_heads.descri: Obtain a mob's head by killing it with a Knife
advancements.rf.farming.sleep.title: Nighty Night
advancements.rf.farming.sleep.descriptio: Make a Bedroll or Bed to sleep your troubles away... may take longer than usual
advancements.rf.farming.decorated_bed.de: Decorate your Bed using a Banner
advancements.rf.farming.shears.title: Snip Snip
advancements.rf.farming.hammer.title: Piko Piko!
advancements.rf.farming.cutting_board.de: Use a Cutting Board to cut or crush ingredients
advancements.rf.farming.tree_bark.title: All Bark and No Bite
advancements.rf.farming.cinnamon_challen: Consume raw Cinnamon and suffer the consequences
advancements.rf.exploration.root.title: Exploration & Discovery
advancements.rf.exploration.bomb.title: It's Yours, My Friend
advancements.rf.exploration.creeper_spor: Throw Creeper Spores to summon friendly Creepies
advancements.rf.exploration.aftershock.d: Get struck by lightning while wearing a piece of Copper armor and gain the Aftershock effect
advancements.rf.exploration.bundle.title: Bundle Up
advancements.rf.exploration.bundle.descr: Obtain a Bundle to carry more types of items while using less space
advancements.rf.exploration.quiver.title: To the Knee
advancements.rf.exploration.quiver.descr: Obtain a Quiver to carry lots of Arrows
advancements.rf.exploration.sack.title: Hit the Sack
advancements.rf.exploration.sack.descrip: Obtain a Sack to carry 12 extra slots of items
advancements.rf.exploration.terrabin.des: Obtain a Terrabin to carry a whopping 27 extra slots of items
advancements.rf.exploration.tame.title: Got a Friend in Me
advancements.rf.exploration.flute.title: Ocarina Time!
advancements.rf.exploration.summon_tuff_: Summon a Tuff Golem with Wool and a Carved Pumpkin on top of Tuff
advancements.rf.exploration.summon_coppe: Summon a Copper Golem by placing a Lightning Rod on top of a Carved Pumpkin
advancements.rf.exploration.summon_iron_: Summon an Iron Golem by placing four Iron Blocks in a T-shape and a Carved Pumpkin on top
advancements.rf.exploration.tune_golem.d: Use a tuned Tuning Fork on a Copper or Iron Golem
advancements.rf.exploration.repair_golem: Repair a Copper or Iron Golem with a Copper or Iron Ingot
advancements.rf.exploration.navigation_t: Obtain a Compass and Depth Gauge
advancements.rf.exploration.lodestone.de: Place down a Lodestone and use a Compass on it
advancements.rf.exploration.mushroom_fie: Come across a Mushroom Fields biome
advancements.rf.exploration.all_ores.des: Collect every ore in pure block form using a Rose Gold Pickaxe
advancements.rf.exploration.all_wood.des: Collect every type of Log or Wood
advancements.rf.exploration.ocean_monume: Locate an Ocean Monument, home of the Guardians
advancements.rf.exploration.conduit.desc: Obtain a Conduit and activate it
advancements.rf.exploration.exopearls.de: Obtain Awoken or Spirited Exopearls to locate various structures
advancements.rf.exploration.peeper.title: Staring Contest
advancements.rf.exploration.peeper.descr: Get spotted by a Peeper - only look away when you have to
advancements.rf.exploration.dungeon.desc: Come across any type of dungeon
advancements.rf.exploration.fragile_ston: Mine into some Fragile Stone or Fragile Deepslate
advancements.rf.exploration.lush_caves.d: Come across a Lush Caves biome
advancements.rf.exploration.dripstone_ca: Come across a Dripstone Caves biome
advancements.rf.exploration.jukebox.desc: Place down a Jukebox and get musical
advancements.rf.exploration.eleven.title: Mending Broken Memories
advancements.rf.exploration.pyramid.desc: Stumble upon a Desert, Badlands or Jungle Pyramid
advancements.rf.exploration.deep_dark.de: Come across a Deep Dark biome
advancements.rf.exploration.ancient_city: Discover an Ancient City in the Deep Dark biome
advancements.rf.exploration.glimmering_w: Come across a Glimmering Weald biome
Against all odds, overpower the Warden
advancements.rf.exploration.totem_of_und: Use a Totem of Undying to cheat death
advancements.rf.exploration.all_relics.d: Collect the four ancient relics scattered around the world
advancements.rf.machines.root.title: Machines & Contraptions
advancements.rf.machines.root.descriptio: The age of machinery is upon us!
advancements.rf.machines.redstone.title: Red Power
advancements.rf.machines.explosive.title: And Kablooey!
advancements.rf.machines.item_movement.d: Place down Hoppers and Item Pipes
advancements.rf.machines.sturdy_alloy.de: Mix Sturdy Stone and Zinc to make Sturdy Alloy
advancements.rf.machines.millstone.title: Hot Mills in Your Area
advancements.rf.machines.windmill_bearin: Place down a Windmill Bearing to start preparing a windmill
advancements.rf.machines.steam_engine.de: Place down a Steam Engine on a Fluid Tank to start preparing a steam boiler
advancements.rf.machines.engineering_too: Craft an Engineer's Wrench, a pair of Engineer's Goggles and a Toolbox
advancements.rf.machines.mechanical_mixe: Place down a Mechanical Mixer over a Basin
advancements.rf.machines.blaze_burner.de: Capture a Blaze inside of a Blaze Burner
advancements.rf.machines.superheating.de: Feed a Blaze Tart to a Blaze Burner to super-heat it
advancements.rf.machines.latex.title: Latex Treks
advancements.rf.machines.latex.descripti: Right-click on a Latex Jungle or Rosewood Log with a glass bottle to obtain Latex
advancements.rf.machines.rubber.title: It's a Ball!
advancements.rf.machines.brass.title: Brass, Brass, Brass!
Place down any storage blocks, a Storage Interface and a Storage Terminal
advancements.rf.machines.rotation_speed_: Place down a Rotation Speed Controller
advancements.rf.machines.deployer.title: Deploy This!
advancements.rf.machines.precision_mecha: Through a Sequenced Assembly using Deployers, create Precision Mechanisms
advancements.rf.machines.train_tracks.de: Through crafting or a Sequenced Assembly using Deployers, create Train Tracks
advancements.rf.machines.steel.title: Post-Irony
advancements.rf.machines.crushing_wheels: Using Mechanical Crafters, craft a pair of Crushing Wheels
advancements.rf.machines.mechanical_dril: I Repeat, This is a Drill!
advancements.rf.nether.root.title: The Nether
advancements.rf.nether.obsidian.title: Sharpen Your Thinking
advancements.rf.nether.potion.title: Your Strongest Potions
advancements.rf.nether.ancient_debris.de: Obtain Ancient Debris or Ancient Scrap
advancements.rf.nether.necromium.title: Death Metal
advancements.rf.nether.netherite.title: A Blast of Heat
advancements.rf.nether.liquefied_lachryt: Obtain a Bottle of Liquefied Lachryte
advancements.rf.nether.enter_nether.desc: Open a portal to the Nether and enter it
advancements.rf.nether.fast_travel.title: Warp Drive
advancements.rf.nether.fast_travel.descr: Travel far enough in the Nether to have travelled 15,000 blocks in the Overworld
advancements.rf.nether.distract_piglin.d: Distract an angry Piglin with Gold
advancements.rf.nether.bastion.title: New Pork City
advancements.rf.nether.hoglin_trophy.des: Hang up a Hoglin Trophy - maybe not in the Overworld
advancements.rf.nether.zoglin_trophy.des: Obtain a Zoglin Trophy by causing a Hoglin Trophy to become zombified
advancements.rf.nether.kill_ghast_fireba: Kill a Ghast by deflecting its fireball back at it
advancements.rf.nether.fortress.title: A Withering Fortress
advancements.rf.nether.kill_wildfire.des: Find and defeat a Wildfire in a Nether Fortress
advancements.rf.nether.summon_wither.des: Assemble four Soul Sand or Soil in a T-shape and place three Withered Skulls on top to summon the Wither
advancements.rf.nether.kill_wither.title: Follow the Star
advancements.rf.nether.stardust.title: Pocket Glitter
advancements.rf.nether.stardust.descript: Crush a Nether Star into Stardust
advancements.rf.nether.beacon.title: The Light of Hope
advancements.rf.nether.beacon.descriptio: Create a Beacon and power it by placing it on a pyramid of valuable blocks
advancements.rf.nether.full_beacon.title: Unlimited Power
advancements.rf.nether.full_beacon.descr: Construct a maximum level Beacon, with 5 layers of resource blocks
